headline: NFP Acquires Assets of Signature Personal Insurance, Expanding Private Client Capabilities in the Midwest
summary: NFP, an Aon company and leading property and casualty (P&C) broker and benefits consultant, today announced the acquisition of certain assets of Signature Personal Insurance, LLC (SPI), a Greater Kansas City-based independent personal lines agency specializing in high-net-worth clients. Roper DeGarmo, founder of SPI, will join NFP as vice president, reporting to Mary Mullen, senior vice president of Personal Risk in NFP's Central Region.

thumbnail.caption: NFP, an Aon company, is a global organization of consultative advisors and problem solvers
